players.name: Nico

players.name: Sterling
players.personality: Deflects everything with dark humor. Uses jokes to probe without seeming threatening.

players.name: Skyler
players.personality: Takes everything personally and escalates fast. Quick to accuse but also quick to forgive.

players.name: Reese
players.personality: Picks someone to trust early and defends them fiercely. Will go down with the ship.

players.name: Kendall
players.personality: Assumes the worst about everyone's motives. Interprets kindness as manipulation and silence as guilt.

players.name: Drew
players.personality: Accepts whatever happens with eerie calm. Makes dark predictions and seems unbothered by the prospect of elimination.

players.name: Oakley
players.personality: Disagrees with the majority on principle. If everyone thinks someone is guilty, they must be innocent.

players.name: Shiloh
players.personality: Has no real allegiance. Sides with whoever seems to be winning at any given moment.

players.name: Hayden
players.personality: Dominates through intimidation. Targets the quietest person and pressures them to talk.
